title: Platform Engineer I
description: Plaid is the financial services infrastructure powering innovation in fintech. We're building the systems that connect millions of consumers to their financial data safely and securely. Join our Platform Engineering team in Phoenix to scale infrastructure supporting thousands of integrated applications and billions in annual transactions.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain platform infrastructure supporting Plaid's API ecosystem
Optimize system performance, reliability, and security across distributed services
Collaborate with product teams to design APIs that enable developer success
Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting systems for production infrastructure
Contribute to infrastructure documentation and operational runbooks

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision plans
Flexible hybrid schedule with Phoenix office
